titleStmt.title: SII 22.437: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao

No. 437. (A.R. No. 437 of 1906) COIMBATORE DISTRICT, GOPICHETTIPALAIYAM TALUK, DAṆĀYAKAṈKŌṬṬAI. RUINED ŚIVA TEMPLE IN THE FORT—ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE MAṆḌAPA VĪRA BALLĀḶADĒVA (III)-ŚAKA 1260, PRAMĀTHI.

summary.p: This registers a sarvamānya grant of two villages Paṇikkappaḷḷi and Araśēri in Oḍuvaṅgā-nāḍu, one made in Śaka 1258 (expired) Īśvara, and the other in the present year Pramāthi, together with all the taxes due thereon as kaḍamai, to the temple of Tāntōṉṟīśvaramuḍaiyai-nāyanār at Tuṟavalūr alias Nīlagiri-Sādhāraṇankōṭṭai, by Mādappaṉ Siṅgaya-Daṇṇāyakar, the mahāpradhāni of the king. Among the kaḍamai dues are mentioned vēḍikkai (entertainment tax ?), kuṟṟadaṇḍam (fine) and santati-illā-poruḷ (escheat).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . viravallāḷatevar pṛthivirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakābdam 1000 2 100 5 10 8 ṉmel cellāniṉṟa Īśvara varuṣattu mācimātam mutal
tuṟavalūrāṉa nilagirisādhāraṇaṉkoṭṭaiyil Uṭaiyār tāntoṉṟīśvara muṭaiya nāyaṉārkku śrīmaṉumahāpradhāni Immaṭi rākuttarāyaṉ
citakarakaṇṭaṉ nilagiri sādhāraṇaṉ dāsiveśya paranāri sahodaraṉ mātappaṉ ciṅkaya daṇṇāyakkar Udakapūrvamākak kuṭutta Oṭuvaṅkānāṭṭu paṇikka paḷḷiyum
piṉpu śakābdam 1000 2 100 6 10- ṉmel pramādisamvatsaram mutal Iṉṉāyaṉārkku Iṉṉāṭṭil kuṭutta Aṟaiceriyum Āka Ūr Iraṇṭukkum kīḻpāṟkellai
kuruntanālikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai Āṟukoṭṭukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai pavaḻa Aṟaikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai nāpantirantu
kallunāṭṭiṉa Ellaikku teṟkum Iṉṉāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa naṉcey puṉcey Aṇaikuḷam vāykkāl melṉokkiṉa maram kiḻṉokkiṉa kiṇaṟu teṉpaṭuvarai miṉmaṭucuṉai poṉ
paṭukuṭṭam maṟṟu meṟperpaṭṭaṉavum kuṭukkaiyil Ivvūrkaḷ Iṟai puravu ciṟṟāyam viṉiyokam veṭikkai tippāṉi tericaṉa kāṇikkai puṟamutal kuṟṟat teṇṭam
Elavai Ukavai cumaicuṅkam cārikai veṭṭimuṭṭāvāḷ coṟumāṭṭu cantatiyillāpporuḷ maṟṟu meṟperpaṭṭa kaṭamaikaḷum Iṉṉāyaṉāṟku sarvamā
nyamākak kuṭuttom .
Digital edition of SII 22.437 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
